ops.text: P0 complete (2026-07-18): github.com/yasyf/daemonkit live and green. Go layer via repo-bootstrap (library escape hatch: cmd/ + internal/ deleted, root doc.go), Swift SPM package hand-merged from a probe-rendered swift-layer scaffold (library-only Package.swift, Sources/DaemonKit with the lifeProtocolVersion=1 pin, macos-26 CI job, settings-swift/mcp-swift fragments imported, swift styleguide at Sources/STYLEGUIDE.md). fusekit's scripts/test.sh harness landed in the skeleton commit; ci.yml routes Go tests through it and builds pure. Six commits on main (7f415d73..2bf5cc55), all workflows green. Brand images generated (elder-daemon-hands-orb-to-successor mascot). Deferred: GitHub social-preview upload (cookiesync daemon not running on this host — needs synckitd or a manual upload of docs/assets/social-preview.jpg in repo settings). Papercut fc45a83e: repo-bootstrap verify runs bare go test + fails the sanctioned library hatch. Next: P1 core-port fan-out (sol xhigh ×5 via codex-wrapper).
